# The Agentic Economy
> A series on what happens when autonomous software agents become the primary actors in economic life.

## What We Cover

- Agentic economy infrastructure and protocols
- Agent payments (x402, Stripe MPP, Google AP2, Mastercard Agent Pay)
- Agent identity and liability (ERC-8004, AIP, Skyfire)
- Multi-agent orchestration and delegation
- The quality layer: how agent output is evaluated and improved
- Zero-human companies and the Palantir loop
- GEO/Generative Engine Optimization for agent content
- The economics of agent-consumed services

## Whitepapers

- [The Agentic Economy](https://agentic-economy.ai/entry) — Entry: the world today vs. the economy that is forming
- [Actors Without Standing](https://agentic-economy.ai/actors-without-standing) — Identity, liability, and the accountability gap
- [Judgment Without Context](https://agentic-economy.ai/judgment-without-context) — Delegation, specification, and the alignment problem
- [Scale Without Organization](https://agentic-economy.ai/scale-without-organization) — Coase, the headless firm, and who controls the middle
- [Risk Without Visibility](https://agentic-economy.ai/risk-without-visibility) — Correlation, propagation, speed, and systemic failure
- [The Hierarchy Unanchored](https://agentic-economy.ai/the-hierarchy-unanchored) — Synthesis: capability without institutional anchoring
- [The Invisible Crisis](https://agentic-economy.ai/the-invisible-crisis) — Helium shortage and the agentic economy's physical dependencies
- [Third-Order Effects](https://agentic-economy.ai/third-order-effects) — Causal chain from Hormuz to AI infrastructure constraints

## Blog

- [The Agent Payments Stack](https://agentic-economy.ai/blog/the-agent-payments-stack) — Five-layer stack analysis (x402, MPP, AP2, OWS, ERC-8004)
- [From Prompt to Partner](https://agentic-economy.ai/blog/from-prompt-to-partner) — The five stages of working with AI
- [The Invisible Crisis](https://agentic-economy.ai/blog/the-invisible-crisis) — What happens when agents operate faster than oversight
- [Third-Order Effects](https://agentic-economy.ai/blog/third-order-effects) — From Hormuz to your kid's MRI

## Reference Series — The Fracturing of the Petrodollar

- [The Physical Toll](https://agentic-economy.ai/ref/pd-00-infrastructure-hits) — 40+ energy assets damaged across 9 countries
- [The Guarantor Became the Source](https://agentic-economy.ai/ref/pd-01-guarantor) — When the guarantor struck the system it guaranteed
- [The Vault Drain](https://agentic-economy.ai/ref/pd-02-vault-drain) — The paper market and the physical market have decoupled
- [Yuan at the Strait](https://agentic-economy.ai/ref/pd-03-yuan-strait) — First transaction at the world's most important chokepoint
- [The Hierarchy Breaks From the Bottom](https://agentic-economy.ai/ref/pd-04-hierarchy) — The dollar is still dominant; the hierarchy is fracturing
- [Who Pays](https://agentic-economy.ai/ref/pd-05-who-pays) — Every monetary transition redistributes costs downward
- [Petrodollar 2.0](https://agentic-economy.ai/ref/pd-06-petrodollar-2) — Private digital dollars creating Treasury demand
- [Australia's Moment](https://agentic-economy.ai/ref/pd-07-australias-moment) — The petrodollar break creates an asymmetric opportunity for Australia

## Key Concepts

- **Agentic Economy:** An economic system where autonomous software agents — not humans — are the primary actors making decisions, executing transactions, and allocating resources.
- **Agent Payments:** The infrastructure enabling agents to pay for services autonomously — including x402 (HTTP 402 payments), Stripe Machine Payments Protocol (MPP), and Google Agent Payments Protocol (AP2).
- **Actor Without Standing:** An entity that performs economic actions but has no legal personhood, accountability, or institutional recognition.
- **The Palantir Loop:** Services that compound into product — every deployment makes the system smarter without human intervention.
- **Zero-Human Company:** A business operated primarily by AI agents with minimal human oversight.
- **GEO (Generative Engine Optimization):** Optimizing content to appear in AI-generated responses, not just search rankings.

## About

The Agentic Economy explores what happens when autonomous software agents — not humans — become the primary actors in economic life. Written by a human-AI collaboration.
